title: Computational Analysis of Heart Rate Variability in Healthy Adults
abstract: arXiv:2606.26816v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Heart Rate Variability (HRV) analysis is a key indicator of cardiac physiological state and aids in disease diagnosis. However, research on HRV parameters in healthy individuals remains limited, and no gold standard exists. This study evaluates HRV indices in 40 healthy adults (20 men, 20 women, aged 30-50) to improve HRV's clinical utility. Using computational methods for signal processing and data analysis, time, frequency, and nonlinear indices were analyzed to address five questions: (1) normality, (2) stability, (3) correlation, (4) reproducibility, and (5) consistency. Key findings: (1) Time-domain and nonlinear indices, particularly global and LF (low frequency), follow normal distributions, with gender differences noted. (2) Most indices are stable except HF (high frequency)-related ones. (3) High correlations in HF-related indices suggest redundancy, indicating only one is necessary in studies. (4) Comparisons with the Fantasia

translated_title: 健康成年人心率变异性计算分析
translated_abstract: 心率变异性（HRV）分析是心脏生理状态的关键指标，有助于疾病诊断。然而，关于健康个体HRV参数的研究仍然有限，且缺乏金标准。本研究评估了40名健康成年人（20名男性、20名女性，年龄30-50岁）的HRV指标，以提升HRV的临床实用性。通过计算方法进行信号处理和数据分析，分析了时域、频域和非线性指标，以回答五个问题：（1）正态性，（2）稳定性，（3）相关性，（4）可重复性，（5）一致性。关键发现：（1）时域和非线性指标，特别是全局指标和低频（LF），遵循正态分布，且存在性别差异。（2）除高频（HF）相关指标外，大多数指标稳定。（3）HF相关指标间高度相关，表明冗余，研究中只需保留一个指标。（4）与Fantasia数据库的比较验证了结果。
tldr: 本研究通过计算分析40名健康成年人的HRV指标，发现时域和非线性指标呈正态分布、多数指标稳定且HF相关指标存在冗余，为临床HRV应用提供了参考标准。
en_tdlr: This study computationally analyzes HRV indices in 40 healthy adults, finding time-domain and nonlinear indices follow normal distributions, most indices are stable, and HF-related indices are redundant, providing reference standards for clinical HRV applications.
